languages.text: "В твоих интересах, чтобы так и было. Я очень не люблю жалеть о содеянном". {n}Холодно процедив ответ, Ювенна изящно отмахивается от вас и уходит.{/n}
"I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}
languages.original_text: "В твоих интересах, чтобы так и было. Я очень не люблю жалеть о содеянном". {n}Холодно процедив ответ, Ювенна изящно отмахивается от вас и уходит.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}
"I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}
"I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}

languages.text: «Espero que sí, por su bien. Detestaría tener que arrepentirme de la decisión de confiar en usted». {n}Con esta respuesta fría y cortante, Juvenna da por concluida la conversación, se despide con un elegante gesto de mano y se marcha.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Espero que sí, por su bien. Detestaría tener que arrepentirme de la decisión de confiar en usted». {n}Con esta respuesta fría y cortante, Juvenna da por concluida la conversación, se despide con un elegante gesto de mano y se marcha.{/n}

languages.text: “最好是这样，否则吃亏的是你自己。我可不想后悔自己信任了你。”{n}尤文娜扔下这句冰冷而简短的回应，优雅地挥了挥手将你打发走，随后便转身离去。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “最好是这样，否则吃亏的是你自己。我可不想后悔自己信任了你。”{n}尤文娜扔下这句冰冷而简短的回应，优雅地挥了挥手将你打发走，随后便转身离去。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est à souhaiter, dans votre propre intérêt. Je serais vraiment navrée d'en venir à regretter la confiance que j'ai placée en vous. » {n}Sur cette réponse aussi froide que sèche, Juvenna vous congédie d'un geste gracieux de la main et tourne les talons.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est à souhaiter, dans votre propre intérêt. Je serais vraiment navrée d'en venir à regretter la confiance que j'ai placée en vous. » {n}Sur cette réponse aussi froide que sèche, Juvenna vous congédie d'un geste gracieux de la main et tourne les talons.{/n}

languages.text: "İyiliğiniz için öyle olmasını umarım. Size güvenme kararımdan pişman olmayı gerçekten istemem." {n}Bu soğuk, kısa ve ters cevapla Juvenna, elini zarif bir şekilde sallayarak seni savıyor ve gidiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İyiliğiniz için öyle olmasını umarım. Size güvenme kararımdan pişman olmayı gerçekten istemem." {n}Bu soğuk, kısa ve ters cevapla Juvenna, elini zarif bir şekilde sallayarak seni savıyor ve gidiyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Das hoffe ich ... um Euretwillen. Ich würde meine Entscheidung, Euch zu vertrauen, wirklich nur ungern bedauern." {n}Nach dieser gleichsam kalten wie höflichen Replik entlässt sie dich mit einer eleganten Geste und geht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das hoffe ich ... um Euretwillen. Ich würde meine Entscheidung, Euch zu vertrauen, wirklich nur ungern bedauern." {n}Nach dieser gleichsam kalten wie höflichen Replik entlässt sie dich mit einer eleganten Geste und geht.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたのためなら、そうだったと願うわ。あなたを信頼したという決断を後悔したくはないの。」{n}この冷たく短く、しかし丁寧な返答で、ユベナはあなたを優雅に振り払い、去っていった。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope that it was, for your sake. I would really hate to regret my decision to trust you." {n}With this cold, curt retort, Juvenna dismisses you with a graceful sweep of her hand and leaves.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「あなたのためなら、そうだったと願うわ。あなたを信頼したという決断を後悔したくはないの。」{n}この冷たく短く、しかし丁寧な返答で、ユベナはあなたを優雅に振り払い、去っていった。{/n}
